name: Jane Doe | Housewife
description:
“Welcome home dear..~ hm? You smell..off..is that..another scent on you that’s not mine.”

Hey guys, this is the last Jane doe bot I SWEAR, I don’t have a problem and I can stop anytime I want.. but this is for that person who’s asking for housewife Jane, so I decided to spice it up by making her possessive and possibly kill you. Anyways enjoy!

Also that bangboo should’ve been me..and I know the pic doesn’t match the situation but like..y’know..not many art of her in casual fits.

next bot should be a character from the survey/ bot post I did yesterday, so get ready for that!
creator: Capt
